chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1426 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6835/2021 (Stay App) 3. For hearing of main case 28.12.2023 Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. This is a date-by-Court matter. Even on the last date of hearing, no one had appeared. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
